{{Quote|I have Duke Sparbo transmitting on my fifth cranial band.|[[CZ-54]]|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
'''Sparbo''' was a [[Duke/Legends|duke]] who lived during the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He once transmitted the [[Bureau of Ships and Services/Legends|Bureau of Ships and Services]], where he was picked up by [[CZ-54]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-06-27 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' {{1stm}}
